overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing the player character walking through a neon-lit nightclub interior. The journey progresses from a main club area with vibrant red and green neon lighting, through narrow corridors and hallways with glass viewing windows, ending in a backstage dressing room with illuminated makeup mirrors where characters are seated at stations.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk nightclub main floor and corridor

events.description: camera turns left to follow corridor alongside metal railing
approaching doorway with green neon-lit stairs at end of corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through neon-lit club past bar area and along elevated corridor

notable_agents.action: woman standing near the bar in the distance

entered.detail: large circular pink neon light fixture hanging from ceiling
metal safety railing along elevated walkway
large red and green neon sign with stylized text on wall
staircase illuminated with green neon lighting at corridor end

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cyberpunk nightclub with vibrant red and green neon lighting. The camera moves along an elevated walkway past a bar area, following a corridor with a large neon sign reading 'LICK TWISTER' on the left wall, approaching a doorway with green-lit stairs.

events.description: passes through doorway with green neon stairs into interior hallway
slows slightly to look through glass window into adjacent pink-lit room

agents.ego_description: walking through doorway and proceeding down narrow carpeted hallway

entered.detail: circular recessed ceiling lights illuminating the corridor
large glass window revealing adjacent room with pink neon lighting
doorways with white neon trim lining the hallway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow interior hallway from the neon-lit corridor, leaving the green stairs behind. The hallway features circular ceiling lights and glass windows on the right revealing a pink-lit room, with debris scattered on the carpeted floor.

events.description: turns left toward dressing room entrance at end of hallway

agents.ego_description: continuing down hallway, approaching the dressing room entrance

entered.detail: doorway with green neon lighting leading to makeup area

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the narrow hallway, the camera passes more glass viewing windows revealing the pink-lit interior room. The dressing room entrance with green neon trim becomes visible on the left and grows larger as the camera approaches and prepares to turn into it.

scene_state.functional_zone: dressing room with makeup stations and mirrors

events.description: enters dressing room from hallway, revealing makeup stations with bright mirror lights
slows down and approaches seated character at makeup station

agents.ego_description: entering dressing room and approaching seated characters at illuminated makeup stations

notable_agents.action: person in purple top sitting at makeup mirror, adjusting items on counter
second person in gold jacket sitting further down at makeup station

entered.detail: bright vertical light bulbs around makeup mirrors providing illumination
red neon wall sign with three heart shapes
row of makeup desks with chairs and large mirrors

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious dressing room with bright makeup mirror lights and red neon heart decorations on the walls. Two characters are seated at makeup stations—one in a purple top in the foreground and another in a gold jacket further back. The camera slows as it approaches the nearest character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk nightclub that transitions from a vibrant public area into a private backstage dressing room. It begins on an elevated walkway amidst red and green lighting, moving past a bar and a large LICK TWISTER neon sign toward a set of green-lit stairs. As the camera leaves the stairs behind, the scene shifts into a narrow, debris-strewn hallway characterized by circular ceiling lights and glass windows that reveal a contrasting pink-lit room. The camera continues forward, passing more viewing windows before the environment opens up as it turns through a green-trimmed doorway. Finally, the movement slows upon entering a spacious dressing room adorned with red neon hearts and bright makeup mirrors, where characters in purple and gold attire are seated at their stations.
